ddls:
CREATE TABLE "video_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video version */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original video */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the video */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed this version */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was reviewed */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the versioned video file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_versions_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_versions_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, producer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video that was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the video */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration in seconds for which the video was accessed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
